ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the data was collected */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop (e.g., rice, wheat, corn) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "dataset_version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate type of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "crop_description" TEXT /* Description of the crop */,
  "crop_category" TEXT /* Category of the crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soil_composition" (
  "soil_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil composition record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the soil composition was measured */,
  "nitrogen" REAL /* Nitrogen level in the soil */,
  "phosphorus" REAL /* Phosphorus level in the soil */,
  "potassium" REAL /* Potassium level in the soil */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("soil_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_composition_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental data record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset where the environmental data belongs */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature measurement */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity measurement */,
  "ph" REAL /* pH level measurement */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall measurement */,
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station that collected the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_yields" (
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop yield record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset where the crop yield belongs */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop (e.g., rice, wheat, corn) */,
  "yield_value" REAL /* Crop yield value */,
  "yield_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the crop yield */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yield_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_yields_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_yields_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level of the access event */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Detailed message about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset where the prediction belongs */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop (e.g., rice, wheat, corn) */,
  "predicted_yield" REAL /* Predicted crop yield value */,
  "prediction_model" TEXT /* Machine learning model used for prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_category" TEXT /* Category of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "model_prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model prediction record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that made the prediction */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prediction made by the model */,
  "prediction_score" REAL /* Score or confidence of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluation" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Evaluation metric (e.g., mean absolute error, mean squared error) */,
  "evaluation_value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  "evaluation_description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation metric */,
  "evaluation_category" TEXT /* Category of the evaluation metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
